name: D & D Motor Co
description_short: Family-owned used car dealership in Portland, OR offering a hands-off buying experience at 2717 N Hayden Island Dr. Not a financial services provider.
description_long:
D&D Motor Co LLC is a family-owned and operated used car dealership located at 2717 N Hayden Island Dr, Portland, OR 97217. The business markets itself around a "hands-off buying experience," suggesting a low-pressure sales environment uncommon at many traditional dealerships. The Portland location appears on Yelp with a listing updated as recently as January 2026, indicating active operation. No founding year, certifications (CDFI, HUD, NFCC), or corporate affiliations have been verified for this location.

D&D Motor Co Portland sells used vehicles. Beyond the "hands-off" sales approach noted in their Yelp profile, specific inventory details, financing options, vehicle makes and models, price ranges, and eligibility criteria are not publicly documented in available research. It is unclear whether this location offers in-house or Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) financing — a feature confirmed at a similarly named but unrelated D&D Motor Co in Andrews, TX. Shoppers should contact the dealership directly at (503) 878-1367 for current inventory and financing details.

The dealership carries a 5.0/5 Google rating based on 111 reviews, which is a notably strong score in the used car sector where consumer trust is often low. The family-owned structure may contribute to a more personalized customer experience compared to large chain dealerships. However, the absence of a public website limits transparency around inventory, pricing, and financing terms.

The primary limitation of D&D Motor Co Portland is the lack of publicly available information: no website, no confirmed financing terms, no listed inventory, and no verified BBB status. Consumers researching this dealership will need to contact them directly to assess fit. It is also worth noting that "D&D Motor Co" is a name shared by at least three other unrelated businesses across the country, so searchers should confirm they are reaching the Portland, OR location specifically.
address: 2416 N Hayden Island Dr, Portland, OR 97217

diagnosis: D&D Motor Co Portland is best suited for local used car buyers in the Portland metro area who value a family-run, low-pressure dealership environment and are willing to visit or call for inventory and financing details. The main caveat is that this business is a used car dealership — not a financial services provider — and is listed on CreditDoc primarily due to potential auto financing offerings that have not been publicly confirmed for this location.
